data.title: test-bridge-observability-e2e.sh: e2e test fails in full suite -> pre-existing failure untracked
data.description:
## Incident Overview
test-bridge-observability-e2e.sh fails in the full test suite run with a non-zero exit code.

## Actual Behavior
The bridge observability end-to-end test fails. This is a pre-existing failure that predates this session.

## Expected Behavior
All tests in the test suite should pass.

## Reproduction
bash tests/run-all.sh (pre-existing failure, unrelated to staged changes)

## Context
Observed during worktree-20260412-173956 full suite run (264 passed, 6 failed). No open ticket found for this failure.
